viz

purpose
- read-only monitoring surface for numereng
- local aggregator over one local store plus optional SSH remote stores

authoritative packages
- backend: `viz/api/numereng_viz/*`
- launcher shim: `viz/api.py`
- frontend: `viz/web/*`

core contract
- experiments mission control uses only `/api/experiments/overview`
- overview is a merged payload from:
  - local `build_monitor_snapshot(store_root=...)`
  - zero or more SSH `numereng monitor snapshot --json` calls

federation rules
- stores stay per-machine; never sync full `.numereng`
- remote snapshot fetch success sets source state; it does not imply live runs exist
- `experiment_id` is not globally unique across sources
- UI list keys must include `source_kind + source_id + experiment_id`

critical frontend rules
- initial experiments page load should fetch real overview, not fallback-only parent data
- overview polling must be single-flight; do not overlap requests
- `generated_at` from merged overview is the page pulse clock
- if polling fails, hold the last good snapshot instead of blanking

critical backend rules
- merged overview must include `generated_at`
- remote snapshots may be cached for one poll cycle only
- sort/merge logic must tolerate duplicate experiment ids from different sources

debug workflow
- compare page against `GET /api/experiments/overview`
- if browser shows stale pulse, suspect client tab/session first
- verify remote directly with `ssh <target> ... numereng monitor snapshot --json`
- for short runs, confirm started/finished timestamps from remote `runtime.json`

files to inspect first
- `viz/api/numereng_viz/monitor_snapshot.py`
- `viz/api/numereng_viz/store_adapter.py`
- `viz/web/src/routes/experiments/+page.ts`
- `viz/web/src/routes/experiments/+page.svelte`
- `viz/web/src/lib/api/client.ts`
